title: erysimum capitatum var. amoenum
intro: Erysimum capitatum var. amoenum, also known as the fragrant wallflower, is a perennial plant native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been valued for its potential health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Erysimum capitatum var. amoenum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a medical professional.
